metadata.description: Checks and balances triggered when days to get paid after a sale is above industry benchmark
metadata.focus: Accelerate collections, tighten credit risk, eliminate billing bottlenecks, prevent bad debt

universal_controls.title: Daily unpaid sales reports & Escalation Protocol
universal_controls.description: Automate daily aging reports. Trigger tiered actions: Day 31 (email), Day 45 (call + payment link), Day 60 (hold new orders), Day 90 (collections agency/legal).

universal_controls.title: Credit Policy Audit & Customer Vetting
universal_controls.description: Review all active customers. Downgrade or place on Cash-on-Delivery (COD) any account more than 45 days past due. Require financials or trade references for new credit approvals.
universal_controls.audit_trail: Credit approval matrix + customer risk scorecard

universal_controls.title: Billing Accuracy & Dispute Triage
universal_controls.description: Audit last 30 invoices for pricing errors, missing purchase orders, or wrong addresses. Resolve disputes within 48 hours to prevent artificial inflation of the number of days it takes to get paid after a sale.
universal_controls.audit_trail: Billing error log + dispute resolution tracker

universal_controls.title: Automated Collection & Payment Portal Deployment
universal_controls.description: Implement automated reminder sequences + self-serve payment portal. Track click-to-pay conversion rate weekly.
universal_controls.audit_trail: Collection campaign report + portal adoption metrics

controls.title: Progress Billing Enforcement
controls.description: Submit draw requests within 24 hours of milestone completion. Track unbilled work daily. Follow up on retainage release schedules.

controls.title: Subcontractor Payment Alignment
controls.description: Implement pay-when-paid clauses where legal. Never release sub payments before client receipt. Require lien waivers upfront.
controls.audit_trail: Sub payment schedule + lien waiver repository

controls.title: Stop-Ship & Cash-on-Delivery (COD) Conversion Protocol
controls.description: Automatically flag accounts more than 30 days past due for order holds. Require cash-on-delivery or credit card pre-auth until balance drops below threshold.
controls.audit_trail: Order hold log + Cash-on-Delivery (COD) conversion tracker

controls.title: Insurance Pre-Authorization & Eligibility Gate
controls.description: Verify coverage and obtain auth before service. Track denial reasons daily. Appeal within 7 days. Implement patient point-of-service collection for deductibles.
controls.audit_trail: Eligibility verification log + denial appeal tracker

controls.title: Patient Payment Plan Automation
controls.description: Offer structured 3-6 month payment plans at checkout. Auto-debit reduces administrative days to get paid after a sale drag.
controls.audit_trail: Payment plan agreements + auto-debit success rate

controls.title: WIP-to-Invoice Cycle Compression
controls.description: Bill weekly instead of monthly. Require client purchase orders before work begins. Track unbilled hours daily and enforce 5-day invoicing SLA.
controls.audit_trail: WIP aging report + invoicing SLA compliance log

controls.title: Change Order Pre-Approval Gate
controls.description: No out-of-scope work without signed change order + deposit. Prevents unbilled scope creep that inflates days to get paid after a sale.
controls.audit_trail: Change order log + deposit receipt tracker

controls.title: Floorplan & Receivables Reconciliation
controls.description: Daily match of sold units to lender payoffs. Flag delayed title/insurance docs that hold up receivable conversion.
controls.audit_trail: Daily payoff reconciliation log + title delay report

controls.title: Milestone Billing & Acceptance Sign-Off
controls.description: Enforce client acceptance signatures before next phase billing. Track unbilled Work-In-Progress (WIP) daily. Escalate stalled sign-offs within 72 hours.
controls.audit_trail: WIP aging report + client sign-off tracker
